The '''drixfar''' was a [[Music/Legends|musical]] instrument made of [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] engine parts. It can be assumed from the name that it was in the same family as the [[Fanfar/Legends|fanfar]]. During the [[Boonta Eve/Legends|Boonta's Eve]] Race, a group of [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] musicians in the stands played various horns, including the drixfar.

*{{Film|I}} {{1st}}
